title: 你好世界 🌍 こんにちは

messages.content: 你好世界 🌍 こんにちは

multiple languages - "你好世界  こんにちは" (Hello world in Chinese, Earth emoji, and Japanese "konnichiwa"). This is a simple greeting. I should respond in Chinese per my CLAUDE.md instructions, keep it brief, and follow the structured format: conclusion + one-sentence reason + next action.

No tool exploration needed for a greeting. Just acknowledge briefly and offer to help.</think>
